invariants: operator authentication does not create Live capability
ProductCapabilities do not reset kill switch
changing active_environment does not reset kill switch
correct PIN does not bypass edition lock
last_successful_environment cannot launch an environment forbidden by current capabilities
clicking a mode does not change active_environment
active_environment changes only by CoreHost after all gates
DesktopShell does not apply runtime mutation itself
gate_order_rules: requested_environment enum validation precedes edition environment capability lookup
operator authorization success does not bypass edition capability
current edition LIVE denies at edition environment capability gate
edition capability denial occurs before credential read, endpoint resolution, adapter creation and connection creation
UI dialog flow and Core activation flow have separate responsibilities

TESTNET_READY_requires: kill switch does not block activation

rules: persisted LIVE from incompatible or future edition is not activated
current edition never performs Live reconnect
Testnet reconnect revalidates endpoint and credential scope
Paper recovery cannot inherit private external execution route
kill switch remains separate persistent state and is not cleared by environment recovery
denied transition does not set active_environment=LIVE

signature_contract.validated_result: immutable capability snapshot used by Core
signature_contract.capability_set_hash_definition: SHA-256 over RFC8785_JCS canonical bytes of the unique lexicographically sorted capability_set string array.
signature_contract.signed_payload_hash_definition: SHA-256 over RFC8785_JCS canonical bytes of the complete capability_payload object.

signed_payload_json_type_policy.number_future_schema_policy: Numbers require full RFC8785 number serialization, I-JSON interoperability, and explicit schema-version opt-in.

contract_schema.description: ProductCapabilities defines the signed capability payload schema; a payload without the signed document envelope is not a verified ProductCapabilities document.

rules: requested_environment enum validation precedes edition environment capability lookup
operator authorization success does not bypass edition capability
current edition LIVE denies at edition environment capability gate
edition capability denial occurs before credential read, endpoint resolution, adapter creation and connection creation
UI dialog flow and Core activation flow have separate responsibilities

validation_context_contract.document_fingerprint: SHA-256 over RFC8785_JCS canonical bytes of complete structurally accepted signed-document envelope
